description: arXiv:2502.00345v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The critical role of division of labor (DOL) in enhancing cooperation is well-recognized in real-world applications. Consequently, many cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) methods have incorporated DOL mechanisms to improve cooperation among agents. However, the lack of benchmark tasks specifically designed to evaluate...
author: Yurui Li, Yuxuan Chen, Xiaoli Yang, Shijian Li, Gang Pan
